summary: Iteration 4 — voice messages, image lightbox, and message replies. Backend: audio/* uploads accepted (audio/webm 200 OK), text/plain still 400, /messages accepts {audio_path} and persists a voice message, empty payload → 400 'Message text, image, or audio required', reply_to in same conversation embeds {id, sender_id, text, image_path, audio_path} snippet, reply_to from a different conversation is silently dropped (null). Frontend: alice → bob chat shows start-recording-button mic, lightbox opens on image click with lightbox-close + close-on-outside-click + Escape, message-audio- bubble renders an HTML
passed: POST /api/upload audio/webm with Bearer → 200 {path, content_type: audio/webm, size}
POST /api/upload text/plain → 400 'Only image or audio files allowed'
POST /api/messages with {audio_path} only → 201, persisted with empty text + audio_path
POST /api/messages with neither text/image_path/audio_path → 400 'Message text, image, or audio required'
POST /api/messages with reply_to of a parent in the SAME conversation → reply_to snippet {id, sender_id, text, image_path, audio_path} embedded
POST /api/messages with reply_to of a parent in a DIFFERENT conversation → reply_to silently dropped (null)
Frontend: mic button data-testid=start-recording-button present in composer
Frontend: data-testid=message-audio-<id> bubbles render with an HTML <audio> element (controls)
Frontend: image messages open data-testid=lightbox on inner click; data-testid=lightbox-close present; Escape closes; clicking outside the image closes
Frontend: hover on a message exposes data-testid=reply-button-<id>; click opens data-testid=reply-preview above the input
Frontend: sending while reply-preview is open clears preview and the new message bubble shows a small quoted snippet of the parent (Voice/text)
notes: Voice recording via actual MediaRecorder was NOT exercised in Playwright (headless mic permission flakiness). Per agent guidance, voice send-path was validated by POST /upload (audio/webm) + POST /messages {audio_path} and asserting AudioBubble renders with <audio controls> on the receiver UI — this passed.
Lightbox click target: clicking the wrapping bubble div does NOT open the lightbox; the onClick is bound on the inner . Working as designed; not a bug.
Realtime two-context sync not explicitly re-tested this iteration (covered in iteration_3). Replies and audio_path travel through the same WS message event already validated previously.
